sources.title: Edge AI Market Size, Share & Forecast Report, 2026–2033
claims_supported: Global edge AI market size: $24.91B (2025), $29.98B (2026)
CAGR of 21.7% from 2026 to 2033
Market projected to reach $118.69B by 2033

sources.title: Edge AI Market Size, Share, Growth & Global Report [2034]
claims_supported: CAGR of 29.9% during forecast period
Corroborates surging market status with high growth rate

sources.title: Edge AI infrastructure reaches a real-world inflection point
claims_supported: 2026 confirmed as edge AI infrastructure inflection point
OEM portfolio refreshes moving from pilot to mass-market rollout
Deloitte projection: inference-optimized chip market exceeds $50B in 2026 (up from $20B in 2025)

sources.title: Edge AI IoT devices are hitting mass market in 2026 — here is why it is happening now
claims_supported: IoT Analytics designates 2026 as the edge AI inflection year
OEMs shifting from early pilots to broad portfolio refreshes marketed as edge AI-enabled
NPUs now standard components in consumer smartphones, laptops, and industrial hardware

sources.title: Edge AI Hardware 2026: On-Device Intelligence, Architecture & Chip Comparison
claims_supported: LPDDR6 memory (14.4 Gbps, Jan 2026) breaks the memory wall enabling 30B+ parameter LLMs on mobile
Apple M4 Neural Engine: 38 TOPS
Qualcomm Snapdragon X Elite: 45 TOPS Hexagon NPU
Sub-20ms edge inference vs 100–500ms cloud round-trip latency

sources.title: DBIR 2026: Edge Exploits Hit 22% of Breaches
sources.publisher: Cybelesoft (citing Verizon Data Breach Investigation Report 2026)
claims_supported: Edge device exploitation jumped from 3% to 22% of enterprise breaches (7x increase in one year)
Security posture gap: edge device attack surface is dangerously underprotected
Unmet need: security and governance in distributed edge environments

sources.title: AI Edge Computing Market Statistics 2026: Market Size, Adoption And Industry Growth
claims_supported: NVIDIA, Qualcomm, Intel, Apple, and MediaTek control ~55% of edge AI hardware revenue
NVIDIA: ~39% of edge AI computing revenue
Qualcomm: ~8% of AI/edge semiconductor market
Market revenue in 2026: $29.98B (up 20.3% from 2025)

sources.title: Top Edge AI Startups by Fundraising (2026)
claims_supported: Edge AI startup funding: $1B (2022) → $4.35B (2025)
Average round size for 2025–2026 edge AI rounds: $310M
SiMa.ai: raised $250M+ across 8 rounds, backed by NVIDIA and Sutter Hill
Rebellions raised $250M in September 2025 (ARM, Samsung, Pegatron backing)

sources.title: Enterprise Edge AI Reaches Inflection Point
claims_supported: 97% of US CIOs have edge AI on their technology roadmap for 2025–2026
83% of C-suite and IT executives say edge AI is critical to core business strategy
Top adoption barriers: integration with existing systems (34%), security/governance (32%), lack of expertise (31%)
Customer experience optimization (45%) and computer vision (45%) lead enterprise deployments

sources.title: Qualcomm IE-IoT Expansion Is Complete: Edge AI Unleashed for Developers, Enterprises & OEMs
claims_supported: Qualcomm shipped over 800M AI-capable chips in 2025
Qualcomm completed 5 acquisitions: Augentix, Arduino, Edge Impulse, Focus.AI, Foundries.io
Market expansion from mobile into automotive, IoT, and industrial edge segments

sources.title: Edge AI Market to Grow at 36.9% CAGR Through 2030
claims_supported: Alternative CAGR projection: 36.9% through 2030 for edge AI chips market
Edge AI chips market expected to reach $291.8B by 2033 at 34.7% CAGR (Grand View Research chips sub-segment)

sources.title: Introduction | The 2026 Edge AI Technology Report
claims_supported: Comprehensive industry analysis of edge AI landscape in 2026
Confirms inflection-point status with OEM mass-market adoption data
Model compression techniques (quantization, pruning) now enable capable LLMs below 4GB RAM

verification_notes.growth_5y: Computed from Grand View Research 21.7% CAGR applied backward 5 years from 2026 market size of $29.98B, implying ~$11.4B in 2021 — yielding +164% growth. Treated as [estimated from CAGR model]. Direct 2021 market size figure not independently verified.
verification_notes.growth_1y: Directly sourced from Grand View Research: $24.91B (2025) → $29.98B (2026) = +20.3%, rounded to +20%.
verification_notes.growth_3m: Estimated from annual CAGR of 21.7%: quarterly equivalent ≈ (1.217^0.25) - 1 ≈ +5.1%, rounded to +5%. No Q-over-Q edge AI market data found in public sources.
verification_notes.market_share: NVIDIA ~39%, Qualcomm ~8%, Apple ~6%, Intel/AMD ~7%, Hailo/SiMa.ai ~2% — sourced from companieshistory.com citing industry aggregates. Remaining ~38% covers Samsung, MediaTek, NXP, STMicroelectronics, and other embedded players. Market share figures are approximations from multiple analyst sources and should be treated as order-of-magnitude estimates.
verification_notes.search_volume: ~70,000 monthly searches estimated for 'edge AI' keyword cluster (edge AI, on-device AI, edge inference, edge computing AI). No Semrush or Ahrefs direct data retrieved in this research session — treat as [estimated].
